'''''The Secret of Joy in the Galaxy''''' was a [[Book/Legends|book]] [[Writing/Legends|written]] by [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]]. It was the best-known of his publications.<ref name="Travel Book" />
